creator: spidey@anarcat.dyndns.org
text:
There is a file installed by majordomo that is not removed my
the deinstall target. The majordomo/Log file is missing from the
pkg/PLIST file.

How-To-Repeat: 
# make deinstall clean
===>  Deinstalling for majordomo-1.94.4
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/majordomo'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is
incorrectly specified?)
===>  Cleaning for majordomo-1.94.4

# ls -l /usr/local/majordomo
total 0
-rw-rw-r--  1 majordom  majordom  0 Dec 29 11:06 Log
